sourceTitle: Leading your company through a pandemic - Issue 20
text: [michellerial](https://instagram.com/michellerial) [![Image from Leading your company through a pandemic - Issue 20](https://bucketeer-e05bbc84-baa3-437e-9518-adb32be77984.s3.amazonaws.com/public/images/__ss-rehost__IG-B-Nc_4BH_IF.jpg)](https://instagram.com/p/B-Nc_4BH_IF) Thank you for ⓢⓣⓐⓨⓘⓝⓖ ⓗⓞⓜⓔ💌 March 26, 2020 2. **Listen**: Supercalifragilisticexpialidocious with some Coronavirus inspired lyrics 3. **Read**: “The simple truth is we are a fantastically social species and threats only fuel our instinct to pro-social behavior” **If you’re finding this newsletter valuable, consider [sharing it with friends](https://www.lennyrachitsky.com/), or subscribing if you aren’t already.** [Sign up now](https://www.lennysnewsletter.com/subscribe?) Sincerely, Lenny 👋
